task.title: Audit https://naroagutierrezgil.com (a11y)
task.description:
Perform a WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility audit on https://naroagutierrezgil.com.

Check and report on:
1. Skip-navigation link — present and functional before main content
2. All images — non-decorative images have meaningful alt text
3. Interactive elements — all buttons and links have accessible names
4. ARIA landmarks — main, nav, header, footer regions declared
5. Color contrast — text meets 4.5:1 ratio (3:1 for large text)
6. Keyboard navigation — all interactive elements reachable via Tab
7. Focus indicators — visible focus rings on all interactive elements
8. Form labels — all inputs have associated <label> elements
9. Language attribute — <html lang="es"> set correctly
10. Heading structure — logical, non-skipping heading levels

For each issue, output:
  wcag_criterion: e.g. "1.1.1 Non-text Content"
  severity: critical | high | medium | low
  element: <CSS selector or description>
  issue: <description of the problem>
  fix: <recommended remediation>

Return as JSON array of findings.

steps.title: Install necessary dependencies for accessibility testing.
steps.description: - Install `axe-playwright-python` and ensure `playwright` browsers are ready.

steps.title: Create a comprehensive accessibility audit script.
steps.description:
- Write a Python script using Playwright and Axe-core to audit `https://naroagutierrezgil.com`.
- The script will specifically check for the 10 points requested: skip-navigation, alt text, interactive names, ARIA landmarks, contrast, keyboard nav, focus indicators, form labels, lang attribute, and heading structure.

steps.title: Run the audit and capture evidence.
steps.description:
- Execute the script and save the output (JSON from Axe and custom logs).
- Capture screenshots to verify focus indicators and overall layout.

steps.title: Analyze results and format findings.
steps.description:
- Review the automated results and screenshots.
- Categorize each issue by WCAG criterion, severity, element, and provide a fix.

steps.title: Complete pre-commit steps to ensure proper testing, verification, review, and reflection are done.
Submit the final JSON array of findings.
